zh.lifeSummary: 當William Woodcock II於1586年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 勞倫斯 也尤利 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 米爾克 史崔特時，他的父親William Woodcocke I39歲，母親Elizabeth Carpenter34歲。他於大約1607年與Alice Washburne在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1764年住在英國英格蘭諾福爾可林格藍德。他去世於1638年10月12日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 安東林 煙雨 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 武朋 瓦利布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Woodcock II于1586年出生在英国英格兰倫敦聖 勞倫斯 也尤利 煙雨 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的 米爾克 史崔特时，他的父亲William Woodcocke I39岁，母亲Elizabeth Carpenter34岁。他于大约1607年与Alice Washburne在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1764年住在英国英格兰諾福爾可林格藍德。他去世于1638年10月12日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 安東林 煙雨 聖 約翰 馮 巴普蒂斯特 武朋 瓦利布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When William Woodcock II was born in 1586, in St Lawrence Jewry with St Mary Magdalene Milk Street, London, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Woodcocke I, was 39 and his mother, Elizabeth Carpenter, was 34. He married Alice Washburne about 1607, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Ringland, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom in 1764. He died on 12 October 1638, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alice Washburne environ 1607, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Ringland, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1764. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1638, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Morì il 12 ottobre 1638, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.St Antholin, Budge Row, London, London,: イギリスイギリスロンドンスト アンソリン ウィス スト ジョン ス バプティスト ウプオン ワルブルーク
ja.lifeSummary: William Woodcock IIが1586年にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ラウレンス ジュリー ウィス スト マリー マグダリーン ミルク ストレエトで生まれた時，父William Woodcocke Iは39歳，母Elizabeth Carpenterは34歳であった。約1607年にイギリスでAlice Washburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1764年にはイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリングランドに住んでいた。彼は1638年10月12日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト アンソリン ウィス スト ジョン ス バプティスト ウプオン ワルブルークにて埋葬された。

영국 잉글랜드 런던 올잉 스트 마이'스
ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.St Lawrence Jewry, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 로렌스 제리 위스 스트 메리 막달레나 미크 스트릿
ko.St. Antholin, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩
ko.St Antholin, Budge Row, London, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩
ko.lifeSummary: William Woodcock II(이)가 1586년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 로렌스 제리 위스 스트 메리 막달레나 미크 스트릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Woodcocke I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Carpenter(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1607년 영국에서 Alice Washburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1764년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 링글랜드에서 살았다. 그는 1638년 10월 12일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 앤토린 위스 스트 존 테 바프티스트 업 월브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Woodcock II nasceu em 1586, em St Lawrence Jewry with St Mary Magdalene Milk Street, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Woodcocke I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Carpenter, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Washburne aproximadamente 1607, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Ringland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1764. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1638, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.London, London, England: лондон, лондон тоуншип, монро, Мичиган, Соединенные штаты
ru.St Lawrence Jewry, London, England: ст ларенс джюри вит ст мэри магдеилин милк стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St. Antholin, London, England: ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.St Antholin, Budge Row, London, London,: ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Woodcock II родился в 1586 г. в местности ст ларенс джюри вит ст мэри магдеилин милк стрит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Woodcocke I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Carpenter, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Washburne около 1607 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности рингланд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1764 году. Он умер 12 октября 1638 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности ст антолинь вит ст джон т баптист упон валлбрук, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Woodcock II nació en 1586, en St Lawrence Jewry with St Mary Magdalene Milk Street, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Woodcocke I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Carpenter, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Alice Washburne aproximadamente 1607, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Ringland, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1764. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1638, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en St Antholin with St John the Baptist upon Wallbrook, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
